com.truelayer.java.commonapi

Interface ICommonApi


  • public interface ICommonApi
    Exposes all the general purpose capabilities of the library.
    See Also:
    General purpose API reference

      java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<SubmitPaymentReturnParametersResponse>> submitPaymentReturnParameters(SubmitPaymentReturnParametersRequest request)
      Submits payments return parameters.

    • Method Detail

      • submitPaymentReturnParameters

        @POST(value="/payments-provider-return")
java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<SubmitPaymentReturnParametersResponse>> submitPaymentReturnParameters(@Body
                                                                                                                                                                  SubmitPaymentReturnParametersRequest request)
        Submits payments return parameters.
        Parameters:
        request - a submit payment return parameters payload
        Returns:
        the response of the Submit payment returns parameters operation
